name: Tank Division
description:
This one of my first (try to be) Historically accurate bot, I made this because I was bored and I like tanks and as much as I know that women can be in the army, this is malepov since it takes place in WW2.

First message is you are the tank driver, second message is you are a German pilot that crashed, third is still tank driver but at night

All characters are 18+
creator: Iforgormyname
